title: Stranger Things
ai_description: 80s nostalgia meets supernatural horror. A group of kids uncovers dark secrets in their small town while battling creatures from the Upside Down.

title: The Witcher
ai_description: Geralt of Rivia, a mutated monster hunter, struggles to find his place in a world where people often prove more wicked than beasts.

title: Black Mirror
ai_description: Anthology series exploring twisted, high-tech multiverse where humanity's greatest innovations collide with darkest instincts.

title: Our Planet
ai_description: Breathtaking nature documentary narrated by David Attenborough showcasing Earth's beautiful habitats and the urgent need for conservation.

title: The Crown
ai_description: Historical drama chronicling Queen Elizabeth II's reign, exploring political rivalries, personal struggles, and the evolution of modern Britain.

title: Extraction
ai_description: High-octane action thriller with Chris Hemsworth. Intense combat sequences and emotional depth as a mercenary embarks on a deadly mission.

title: To All The Boys I've Loved Before
ai_description: Charming teen romance about secret love letters. Heartwarming and delightfully awkward journey of first love and self-discovery.

title: The Haunting of Hill House
ai_description: Masterful horror series blending family drama with supernatural terror. Critically acclaimed for its emotional depth and brilliant storytelling.

title: Money Heist
ai_description: Spanish heist crime drama following a mysterious man called 'The Professor' who plans the biggest heist in recorded history.

title: Squid Game
ai_description: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games with deadly stakes.

title: Bridgerton
ai_description: Regency-era London romance from Shondaland. Follows the powerful Bridgerton family navigating high society and scandalous secrets.

title: Ozark
ai_description: Financial advisor drags his family from Chicago to the Missouri Ozarks, where he must launder money to appease a drug boss.

title: The Queen's Gambit
ai_description: Orphaned chess prodigy Beth Harmon struggles with addiction while pursuing chess dominance during the Cold War era.

title: Cobra Kai
ai_description: Decades after the 1984 All Valley Karate Tournament, Johnny Lawrence reopens the Cobra Kai dojo, reigniting his rivalry with Daniel LaRusso.

title: The Umbrella Academy
ai_description: Estranged siblings with supernatural powers reunite to solve their father's mysterious death and prevent a global apocalypse.

title: Virgin River
ai_description: A nurse practitioner moves from LA to a remote northern California town seeking a fresh start, finding love and community.

title: The Sandman
ai_description: Dream, the personification of dreams, escapes after being imprisoned for a century and must restore order in his realm.

title: Wednesday
ai_description: Wednesday Addams is expelled from school and sent to Nevermore Academy, where she attempts to master her psychic ability and solve a murder mystery.

title: Emily in Paris
ai_description: A young American marketing executive moves to Paris to provide an American perspective at a French firm, navigating culture clashes.

title: The Lincoln Lawyer
ai_description: An iconoclastic idealist runs his law practice out of the back of his Lincoln Town Car in Los Angeles, taking on high-profile cases.

title: Heartstopper
ai_description: Teens Charlie and Nick discover their unlikely friendship might be something more as they navigate school, love, and coming out.

title: You
ai_description: A dangerously charming, intensely obsessive young man goes to extreme measures to insert himself into the lives of those he is transfixed by.

title: Outer Banks
ai_description: Teenagers from the wrong side of the tracks in North Carolina's Outer Banks discover a legendary treasure that unites them in a dangerous adventure.

title: Manifest
ai_description: Passengers of Montego Air Flight 828 return home after a turbulent flight to discover that five years have passed while they were missing.

title: The Watcher
ai_description: A family moves into their dream home only to be terrorized by disturbing letters from a stalker calling themselves 'The Watcher'.
Mysterious events unfold when immigrants on a steamship traveling from London to New York encounter another ship adrift on the open sea.

title: The Recruit
ai_description: A CIA lawyer finds himself in the middle of a dangerous situation when an asset threatens to expose her relationship with the agency.

title: Kaleidoscope
ai_description: A master thief and his crew attempt the biggest heist in history, but betrayal, greed, and other threats undermine their plans.

title: That '90s Show
ai_description: It's 1995 and Leia Forman is visiting her grandparents for the summer, where she bonds with a new generation of Point Place kids.

title: Ginny & Georgia
ai_description: Free-spirited Georgia and her two kids move to a New England town, but secrets from Georgia's past threaten her new life.

title: Sweet Tooth
ai_description: A boy who is part human and part deer searches for family and home in a post-apocalyptic world devastated by a deadly virus.

title: Locke & Key
ai_description: After their father's murder, three siblings move into their ancestral home where they discover magical keys that unlock powers and secrets.

title: Fate: The Winx Saga
ai_description: A live-action adaptation following a group of fairies attending a magical boarding school in the Otherworld.

title: Warrior Nun
ai_description: A young woman wakes up in a morgue with inexplicable powers and discovers she's part of a secret order of demon-hunting nuns.

title: Shadow and Bone
ai_description: A young mapmaker discovers she has the power to save her war-torn country from darkness, attracting both allies and enemies.

title: The Last Kingdom
ai_description: A young Saxon warrior fights to reclaim his birthright and defend the kingdom of Wessex against Viking invaders.

title: Vikings: Valhalla
ai_description: 100 years after the original Vikings, legendary heroes like Leif Erikson and Freydis Eriksdottir embark on epic journeys.

title: The Great British Baking Show
ai_description: Amateur bakers compete in a series of challenges to be crowned the UK's best baker in this heartwarming competition.

title: Love is Blind
ai_description: Singles date in pods where they can't see each other, testing if emotional connections can lead to lasting love before seeing their partner.

title: Too Hot to Handle
ai_description: Attractive singles who usually rely on physical connections must form deeper emotional bonds without any physical contact to win a prize.

title: Selling Sunset
ai_description: The elite real estate agents at The Oppenheim Group sell luxury homes to LA's wealthiest clients while navigating personal drama.

title: Queer Eye
ai_description: The Fab Five transform people's lives by making over their fashion, grooming, food, culture, and home design with heartwarming results.

title: Drive to Survive
ai_description: Behind-the-scenes documentary following the high-stakes world of Formula 1 racing, featuring drivers, teams, and intense rivalries.

title: The Last Dance
ai_description: The definitive documentary on Michael Jordan's career and the Chicago Bulls' dynasty, featuring never-before-seen footage from the 1997-98 season.

title: Our Great National Parks
ai_description: Narrated by Barack Obama, this documentary showcases the world's most spectacular national parks and their incredible wildlife.

title: The Keepers
ai_description: A gripping documentary series about the unsolved murder of Sister Cathy Cesnik and the dark secrets hidden by a Catholic school.

title: Wild Wild Country
ai_description: Controversial Indian guru Bhagwan Shree Rajneesh's attempt to build a utopian city in Oregon leads to conflict with local residents.
